name: io.github.hemmabo-se/hemmabo-mcp-server
description: Vacation rental booking infrastructure for independent hosts. Own domain, Stripe direct payments, 0% commission. Each host is a sovereign booking node — own Supabase database, own Stripe account, never routed through a marketplace. AI-native: built on Model Context Protocol + Stripe ACP. 11 tools. Not an OTA. Not a marketplace. Infrastructure. Live: villaakerlyckan.se. From $39/month.
